title: VictoriaMetrics
subtitle: The Definitive Guide
author: Wordsus Team
description: Master the art of scalable monitoring with VictoriaMetrics. This comprehensive guide covers everything from single-node setups and cluster architectures to advanced MetricsQL querying, storage optimization, and cloud-native deployments with Kubernetes.

chapters.title: Introduction to Time Series Databases and VictoriaMetrics
chapters.description: Learn the basics of Time Series Databases, the evolution of the Prometheus ecosystem, and why VictoriaMetrics stands out as a high-performance alternative.

chapters.title: Core Concepts and Architecture
chapters.description: Explore the fundamental architecture of VictoriaMetrics, including its toolchain, resource efficiency principles, and the differences between single-node and cluster versions.

chapters.title: Installation and First Steps
chapters.description: Get VictoriaMetrics up and running using binaries or Docker, and learn the basics of configuration and data ingestion.

chapters.title: Supported Ingestion Protocols
chapters.description: Dive into the wide range of protocols supported by VictoriaMetrics, including Prometheus remote_write, InfluxDB, Graphite, and OpenTelemetry.

chapters.title: Deep Dive into vmagent
chapters.description: Master the role of vmagent in data collection, target scraping, disk buffering, and ensuring high availability.

chapters.title: Relabeling and Data Transformation
chapters.description: Understand the powerful relabeling engine to transform, drop, or modify metrics and labels on the fly.

chapters.title: Introduction to PromQL and MetricsQL
chapters.description: Begin your journey with querying using PromQL basics and the enhanced capabilities of VictoriaMetrics' MetricsQL.

chapters.title: Advanced MetricsQL Functions
chapters.description: Master advanced functions like rollups, subqueries, and template functions for sophisticated data analysis.

chapters.title: Query Optimization and Best Practices
chapters.description: Learn how to execute queries efficiently, identify bottlenecks, and manage high-cardinality data safely.

chapters.title: The Storage Engine Explained
chapters.description: Explore the inner workings of the VictoriaMetrics storage engine, inspired by MergeTree, and its advanced compression techniques.

chapters.title: Data Retention and Deduplication
chapters.description: Configure retention policies, handle out-of-order data, and implement deduplication rules to keep your storage lean.

chapters.title: Downsampling and Historical Data
chapters.description: Learn the importance of downsampling for long-term storage and how to configure multi-tiered retention for historical analysis.

chapters.title: Introduction to vmalert
chapters.description: Understand the architecture of vmalert and how it connects to storage nodes for executing alerting and recording rules.

chapters.title: Recording Rules and Alerting Rules
chapters.description: Craft effective alerting and recording rules using MetricsQL and Go templates for automated monitoring.

chapters.title: Alert Routing and Notifications
chapters.description: Integrate with Alertmanager and vmalertmanager to design complex routing trees and notification systems.

chapters.title: Cluster Architecture Overview
chapters.description: Deep dive into the distributed components of a VictoriaMetrics cluster: vminsert, vmstorage, and vmselect.

chapters.title: Deploying the VictoriaMetrics Cluster
chapters.description: Learn the practical steps to provision, interconnect, and scale a high-throughput VictoriaMetrics cluster.

chapters.title: Multi-Tenancy in the Cluster
chapters.description: Explore how to isolate data and queries for multiple teams or customers using the AccountID and ProjectID structure.

chapters.title: Kubernetes and the VictoriaMetrics Operator
chapters.description: Automate your VictoriaMetrics deployments on Kubernetes using the official operator, CRDs, and Helm charts.

chapters.title: Visualizing Data and Dashboards
chapters.description: Connect VictoriaMetrics to Grafana, build effective dashboards, and use the built-in VMUI for exploration.

chapters.title: Monitoring and Troubleshooting
chapters.description: Implement self-monitoring, analyze logs, and troubleshoot common deployment issues to maintain system health.

chapters.title: Security, Authentication, and Authorization
chapters.description: Secure your infrastructure with TLS, Basic Auth, and advanced routing and role-based access control using vmauth.

chapters.title: Backup, Restore, and Disaster Recovery
chapters.description: Protect your data with snapshots and the vmbackup/vmrestore utilities, integrated with cloud object storage.

chapters.title: Performance Tuning and Capacity Planning
chapters.description: Fine-tune hardware, memory caching, and OS settings to maximize the performance of your VictoriaMetrics instance.

chapters.title: Migration Strategies and Ecosystem Tools
chapters.description: Plan and execute a seamless migration from Prometheus or other systems to VictoriaMetrics, including historical data backfilling.

parts.title: Part II: Data Collection and Ingestion
Part III: Querying and Data Analysis
Part VII: Integrations and Cloud Native
Part VIII: Operations, Security, and Tuning
